xsl:when.test: strikethrough_retail_price and strikethrough_retail_price/@gross > 0 and strikethrough_retail_price/@gross > sizes/size/price/@gross and sizes/size/price/@gross = price/@gross

(strikethrough_retail_price and strikethrough_retail_price/@gross > sizes/size/price/@gross) or (promotion/price/normal_retail_price and promotion/price/normal_retail_price/@gross > sizes/size/price/@gross) or (promotion/price/normal_retail_price and price/@gross != sizes/size/price/@gross and promotion/price/normal_retail_price/iaiext:site/iaiext:price_per_size[@id = ../../../../../sizes/size/@id]/@gross > sizes/size/price/@gross)
string-length($kod_producer) = '14' or string-length($kod_producer) = '13' or string-length($kod_producer) = '12' or string-length($kod_producer) = '8'
string-length($code_on_card) = '14' or string-length($code_on_card) = '13' or string-length($code_on_card) = '12' or string-length($code_on_card) = '8'

translate($cleanedToken,$lowerLetters,'') != '' and string-length(translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')) > 0 and (translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')='ml' or translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')='l' or translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')='g' or translate($cleanedToken,'0123456789.,','')='kg' )
